content.fact_text: Implements a robust Response Management Subsystem for standardized API responses and error handling in a high-load ecommerce environment.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements standardized API response structure, centralized error-to-HTTP mapping, and structured request/error logging with automated PII redaction. Ensures consistent metadata (request IDs and timestamps) across all controller responses.
interfaces: ResponseManager.sendSuccess<T>(res: Response, data: T, statusCode?: number): void
provenance_data.utility: Standardizes API communication, ensures uniform error reporting, and provides observability via structured logs, which is critical for maintaining high-load ecommerce services.
